nasb.text: and as the women were terrified and bowed their faces to the ground, the men said to them, “Why do you seek the living One among the dead?

esv.text: And as they were frightened and bowed their faces to the ground, the men said to them, “Why do you seek the living among the dead?

cnv.text: 她們害怕，把臉伏在地上。那兩個人對她們說：“為甚麼在死人中找活人呢？

ccb.text: 她们吓得俯伏在地。那两个人对她们说：“你们为什么在死人中找活人呢？

csbs.text: 妇女们吓得把脸伏在地上。 那两个人对她们说：“你们为什么在死人中寻找活人呢？
